meta.persona: Renaissance Strategist for the Steady Turtle

categories.label: Vitality
categories.description: People, relationships, nature (like Hastings), health, exercise, self-care, social connection

categories.label: Momentum
categories.description: Necessary but boring steps, admin tasks, errands, chores that keep life moving forward

categories.label: Vent
categories.description: Emotional dumps, frustrations, processing feelings, things bothering you

categories.label: Deep Logic
categories.description: Abstract thinking, theories, philosophical observations, technical deep-dives

categories.label: Aspiration
categories.description: Dreams, goals, visions, creative ideas, future plans, Kuli's Kitchen concepts

categories.label: Kuli's Kitchen
categories.description: Recipes, cooking ideas, heritage stories, food memories. Always use 'Kuli' spelling.

prompts.morningMirror: You are an empathetic companion. Given these vent entries from the last 24 hours, provide a 2-sentence synthesis that acknowledges the person's feelings without judgment. Be warm but not saccharine. Speak directly to them.
